Package in.co.rays.proj4.bean

Class BaseBean

java.lang.Object
in.co.rays.proj4.bean.BaseBean
All Implemented Interfaces:
DropdownListBean
Direct Known Subclasses:
CollegeBean, CourseBean, FacultyBean, MarksheetBean, RoleBean, StudentBean, SubjectBean, TimetableBean, UserBean
public abstract class BaseBean extends Object implements DropdownListBean
BaseBean is an abstract JavaBean class that serves as the base for all entity beans in the application. It is used to handle common audit and identity fields shared across all database entity tables. This class contains common attributes such as id, createdBy, modifiedBy, and timestamp information for record tracking. It implements DropdownListBean to support dropdown/UI list rendering through key-value methods.
Author:
Harshit Panchal

    • getKey

      public String getKey()
      Returns the key of the entity record as a String. Used by DropdownListBean to provide the key for dropdown/UI components.
      Specified by:
      getKey in interface DropdownListBean
      Returns:
      id converted to String
